data.title: Mingfa Group Updates on PRC Subsidiaries’ Board Restructuring
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Mingfa Group (International) Co. Ltd. ( (HK:0846) ).

Mingfa Group (International) Co. Ltd. has announced a progress update on the restructuring of the boards of directors of its PRC subsidiaries. As of the latest update, two subsidiaries have submitted applications for director changes, pending approval from local regulatory authorities. The restructuring will be finalized once these approvals are granted, and the company will continue to provide monthly updates on the progress.

More about Mingfa Group (International) Co. Ltd.

Mingfa Group (International) Co. Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating within the real estate industry. It focuses on property development and management, with a market presence primarily in China.

The latest announcement is out from Helios Energy Ltd ( (AU:HE8) ).

Helios Energy Ltd has entered into an agreement with Pitt Street Research to compensate them with shares instead of cash for their research services. The company issued 6,300,000 fully paid ordinary shares without disclosure to investors, complying with the Corporations Act, and confirmed that no additional information is required for investors to assess the company’s financial position.

More about Helios Energy Ltd

Helios Energy Ltd operates in the energy sector, focusing on the exploration and production of oil and gas resources. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the code HE8 and is known for its strategic operations in both Australia and the USA.

data.title: Gigante Salmon Surpasses First Harvest Expectations
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Gigante Salmon AS ( (DE:96M) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Gigante Salmon has successfully completed its first harvest from trial production, achieving a total harvest volume of 694 tons HOG, surpassing the expected 650 tons. The company is in the final phase of constructing its facility, with two out of three production basins completed, and plans to release 2.2 million smolt in the third quarter of 2025, aiming for a full annual capacity of approximately 16,000 tonnes HOG by 2028.

More about Gigante Salmon AS

Gigante Salmon is a land-based salmon farming company with its first production facility under construction on Lille Indre Rosøy in Rødøy, Norway. The company employs a unique aquaculture concept based on a flow-through system, which combines the benefits of conventional and land-based aquaculture while addressing issues associated with traditional sea-based farming.

Current Market Cap: NOK1.46B

An announcement from ANA Holdings Inc. ( (JP:9202) ) is now available.

ANA Holdings Inc. has announced its agreement with the shareholder proposal from Japan Airlines Co., Ltd. regarding share consolidation at AGP Corporation. The latest announcement is out from Insight Business Support Plc ( (GB:KLSO) ).

Kelso Group Holdings Plc has announced the posting of its Annual Report & Accounts and the Notice of its Annual General Meeting to shareholders. The AGM is scheduled for June 25, 2025, in London. This announcement is a routine part of Kelso’s operations, reflecting its commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement, which may impact investor confidence and market perception.

More about Insight Business Support Plc

Kelso Group Holdings Plc is an acquisition vehicle established in November 2022, focusing on identifying and unlocking trapped value in the UK stock market. data.title: Eurocommercial Properties Announces Scrip Dividend Details
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Eurocommercial Properties NV ( (NL:ECMPA) ).

Eurocommercial Properties N.V. has announced the scrip issue price for its final dividend, offering shareholders the option to receive a cash dividend, new shares, or a combination of both. The new shares are priced at €28.00 each, with a ratio of one new share for every 25 shares held, aligning with the company’s strategy to minimize share dilution. Shareholders must decide by 23 June 2025, with the new shares issued on 3 July 2025. This decision could impact shareholder returns due to tax implications and market price fluctuations, and the proposal for a total dividend of €1.80 for the financial year 2024 will be discussed at the upcoming Annual General Meeting.

More about Eurocommercial Properties NV

Eurocommercial Properties N.V. is a Euronext-quoted property investment company specializing in shopping centers across Europe. Established in 1991, the company owns and operates 24 shopping centers in Belgium, France, Italy, and Sweden, with total assets nearing €4 billion.
